calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Jeffre Lebby, appearing on his own behalf. The parties stipulated to have the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem.
There being no appearance by plaintiff, the court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. The claim of exemption is GRANTED, subject to payment by defendant of $112.00 per pay period. Order signed in open court.
Judge: James Watson, Judge Pro Tem. Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
